name: Claryti
what: Commitment-tracking assistant: ingests Gmail/Outlook, Slack, Google Calendar and meeting recordings (Zoom/Meet/Teams) to auto-capture promises bidirectionally and serve a daily brief of what you owe and are owed.
why_tier: Cross-tool decision/commitment/owner tracking is Astell's open-loops promise, but individual-level brief rather than a team graph; one pivot from direct (cf. Read AI).
notes: Stage inferred (live product, $15/mo, no funding disclosed); HQ/founded undisclosed on site.

name: Zep
what: Context-graph infrastructure ('Context Lake') for AI agents: governed memory combining chat history + business data, temporal validity, ABAC governance, sub-200ms retrieval; SOC2/HIPAA; customers incl. Samsung, AWS, Writer.
why_tier: Sells Astell's graph-memory + mirror-permissions pillars a la carte to agent builders (cf. Cognee/Credal); B2B2B infra one layer below the application.
notes: Founded 2023; funding not disclosed on page; HQ undisclosed.

name: Mem0
what: Drop-in memory layer for AI agents/apps: API that persists and compresses context across sessions to cut tokens/latency; SOC2/HIPAA, air-gapped/private-cloud options; YC-backed, 90k+ developers.
why_tier: Same graph-memory primitive sold to agent builders as Cognee/Zep; developer infra shipping one Astell pillar a la carte.
notes: YC-backed; ~90k developers; stage inferred (funding not on page).

name: Supermemory
what: Memory-layer API plus personal 'remembers everything' app: custom vector-graph engine, hybrid sub-300ms search, connectors for Notion, Google Drive, Gmail, S3 and custom sources.
why_tier: Graph-memory pillar sold a la carte (cf. Cognee/Mem0); work-SaaS connectors edge it toward direct, so picking the higher tier.
notes: Pre-seed; backed by Google/DeepMind/Cloudflare execs (TechCrunch, Oct 2025); HQ undisclosed on page.
